logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "correlationId": vars.correlationId default correlationId, "appName": app.name, "flow": flow.name, "message": "Start of flow " ++ flow.name, "timestamp": now(), }]

#[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "correlationId": vars.correlationId default correlationId, "appName": app.name, "flow": flow.name, "message": "End of flow " ++ flow.name, "timestamp": now(), }]
